validation_queries.description: Check that we have some kernel summary entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary

validation_queries.description: Check for any OpenMP offloading kernels
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE name LIKE '%__omp_offloading%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP offloading kernels found in kernel_summary table

validation_queries.description: Check for kernels with valid call counts
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernel_summary WHERE calls > 0
validation_queries.error_message: No kernels found with valid call counts

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%omp_offloading%'

validation_queries.description: Check that 'omp_offoading' is present in the name column
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE name LIKE '%omp_offloading%'
validation_queries.error_message: 'omp_offoading' not found in the name column of top table

validation_queries.description: Check that 'kernels' is present in the name column
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels WHERE name LIKE '%omp_offloading%'
validation_queries.error_message: 'omp_offloading' not found in the name column of kernels table

validation_queries.description: Check that id is not null in kernels table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM kernels WHERE id IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with null id in kernels table
